item.name: Authentic Evercold Shaved Ice
item.description:
Authentic thinly shaved ice, generously heaped into an authentic oversmall bowl and drizzled with sweet-yet-tangy rolanberry syrup...authentically. Why it never melts is a question best served cold.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 11)
Gear Durability Bonus: +1
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
